source_jobs.title: Senior Fullstack Engineer (ReactJS / Node.js)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

We are Playbook, a leading creator platform for fitness, health, and wellness. Our mission is to help fitness creators build sustainable businesses, while enabling hundreds of thousands of users to live healthier lives.

We are a fast-growing company in the fitness tech space, operating as a remote-first, product-driven team that values ownership, direct communication, and a strong growth mindset. We believe in “drivers, not passengers” — everyone is encouraged to take responsibility, think proactively, and act like an owner.



ROLE OVERVIEW

We’re looking for a Senior Full Stack Engineer (ReactJS / Node.js) to join our remote engineering team. You’ll work on meaningful, user-facing product features across the stack — building reliable backend services and polished frontend experiences.

You’ll collaborate closely with Product and Design to deliver solutions aligned with real customer needs. This role is best suited for a senior individual contributor who enjoys hands-on development, understands that good architecture starts with clear contracts, and thrives on solving complex problems in a fast-moving startup environment.


RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Design and implement new features across the stack (Node.js and ReactJS), with a strong focus on usability, clarity, and real user value, shaping APIs and GraphQL contracts as part of the feature design process.

 - Build and evolve backend services and APIs (REST and GraphQL) that power our platform. Focus on reliability, maintainability, and clean integrations with frontend applications and third-party services.

 - Work closely with Product Managers and Designers to translate requirements into practical, well-scoped technical solutions.

 - Contribute to Engineering Requirement Documents (ERDs) that define data models, API contracts, and integration points before implementation begins.

 - Write clean, readable, and well-tested code. Participate in code reviews and contribute to shared standards around quality, testing, and maintainability. Improve existing systems where it provides clear product or developer value.

 - Take responsibility for the features you build. Identify issues or gaps, propose improvements, and iterate based on feedback. You’re comfortable working with some ambiguity and adapting as requirements evolve.

 - Ability to break down product requirements into data models, GraphQL types, and frontend component structure before writing implementation code.


REQUIREMENTS

 - 5+ years of professional software development experience, with a strong focus on full-stack JavaScript / TypeScript. Proven experience shipping production web applications end-to-end.

 - Strong experience with React.js and modern frontend patterns. Ability to build responsive, user-friendly interfaces with attention to detail and performance. Familiarity with TailwindCSS or similar styling frameworks.

 - Experience with Node.js, including designing GraphQL schemas and understanding resolvers, dataloaders, and API structure for maintainability.

 - Advanced TypeScript proficiency. Our codebase is heavily typed — you should be comfortable writing complex types, generics, conditional types, and using TypeScript to enforce contracts and model domain logic across the stack.

 - Active daily use of AI coding assistants (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, or similar) for development, debugging, and problem-solving. We expect engineers to leverage these tools to ship faster and work through complex problems.

 - Strong experience working with relational databases (PostgreSQL preferred), including schema design, query optimization, and reasoning about data consistency and performance.

 - Strong communication skills in English. Comfortable working in a remote, cross-timezone team and collaborating asynchronously.


NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience with Node.js frameworks: Next.js, NestJS

 - Familiarity with MVVM or similar architectural patterns.

 - Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as

source_jobs.title: Premium Creator Account Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



Playbook works with a group of high-value, long-tenured creators whose relationships predate our current processes. These accounts are complex, trust-based, and critical to the business. We need someone to own them fully — a right hand who will be trained deeply, knows every nuance, and can manage these creators at the highest level without needing to be told twice.

This is a grind-it-out, detail-obsessed role. The right person loves being in the weeds, has no conflicting priorities, and is fully committed to this creator cohort.




WHAT YOU'LL DO



 - Be the right hand to our Head of Creator Management - you will be trained by them, work with them to optimize workflows and build relationships with their portfolio of creators.

 - Long term - manage a focused portfolio of legacy, high-touch creators who require a personalized, relationship-first approach

 - Serve as the primary point of contact for these creators — handle inbound, proactively reach out, and anticipate their needs

 - Shadow and be trained directly by the current relationship owner; absorb every nuance of these accounts

 - Coordinate with internal teams (product, marketing, ops) on behalf of these creators

 - Maintain detailed records of relationship history, preferences, and ongoing commitments

 - Flag risks, blockers, or opportunities early — nothing should fall through the cracks




WHO YOU ARE

 - You are expected to be an expert on growing creator business

 - Someone who is deeply immersed in the creator space and confident in creator monetization strategies

 - Obsessively organized and reliable — you follow up, follow through, and don't let things slip

 - A relationship-builder at heart — you enjoy getting to know people deeply and being genuinely useful to them

 - Comfortable with ambiguity and able to operate independently once trained - you are a driver

 - Someone who finds satisfaction in execution and relationship management

 - Previous experience in account management, creator management, talent management, or a similar client-facing role




WHY THIS ROLE MATTERS

These creator relationships represent significant revenue and brand trust for Playbook. This hire ensures continuity, protects those relationships, and frees up senior leadership to focus on growth. This is a mission-critical role, not a support role.

source_jobs.title: Sales Lead
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



We're building out a dedicated sales function at Playbook and need a Sales Lead to own it. This person runs our creator acquisition pipeline end-to-end — from sourcing leads to closing deals — and also manages and develops the team doing it. Every new Creator Manager (CM) coming into Playbook will report through this function until we scale further.

If you love data, accountability, and driving a team to hit meaningful numbers, read on.




WHAT YOU'LL OWN



Daily Reporting

 - Track sourcing engine output: new leads added to the database daily

 - Report on leads contacted, replied, on-call, and closed

 - Maintain clean, organized database with proper tagging and labeling

Day-to-Day Operations

 - Morning stand-up and team check-ins

 - Call reviews — listen, coach, improve

 - Ongoing reporting on pipeline health and conversion rates

Systems & Tools

 - Own the CRM — keep it clean and up to date

 - Manage the databasing and lead tracking tool

 - Oversee analytics, outreach scripts, pitch decks, and closing materials

 - Handle contracts and closing process

Training & Enablement

 - Build and maintain sourcing SOPs — how we find, qualify, and approach creators

 - Own the Creator Manager onboarding and ramp-up process

 - Own the implementation of the Creator Manager onboarding process of new creators

Team Leadership

 - Hire, manage, and replace as needed — you own performance on this team

 - Monitor team capacity and flag when we need more resources

 - Own the goal: drive X closes per period and hold the team accountable to it


WHO YOU ARE

 - A proven sales operator — you've run a pipeline, hit quotas, and managed a team

 - Data-driven and process-obsessed — you live in the CRM and know your numbers cold

 - A strong coach — you can listen to a call, diagnose what went wrong, and fix it

 - Comfortable owning outcomes, not just activities

 - Experience in creator economy, influencer, talent, or marketplace sales is a strong plus

source_jobs.title: Social Media Lead for Talent
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

Social media is the highest-leverage item we can do behind our top talent.

We need a Social Media Lead who lives and breathes organic content strategy, knows every algorithm update the day it drops, and can build repeatable, creator-specific playbooks that actually move the needle on social media growth and monetary growth for our top talent.




WHAT YOU'LL DO



Strategy & Research

 - Develop bespoke social strategies for top-tier Playbook talent

 - Research viral trends, algorithm changes, and new platform features across Instagram and TikTok

 - Track and analyze performance of our top talent weekly

 - Run weekly viral content analysis and distribute insights to the team

 - Publish a recurring newsletter on social trends relevant to our creator verticals

 - May do community calls / webinars

 - Feedback and support for paid ad creative

 - Support with curriculum and creator training




Creator Playbooks

 - Build launch marketing kits: do-exactly-this templates, post formats, captions, timing — no guesswork

 - Build challenge marketing kits in the same format

 - Break down posting perfection for each key vertical: Fitness, Yoga, CrossFit, Moms & Dads, etc.

 - Develop mastery of what to post for lead generation vs. conversion — and teach it

 - Cover ad creative strategy, since most paid is amplified organic




Editing & Production Guidance

 - Stay current on the best editing tools and techniques

 - Coach creators and CMs on how to edit better — speed, hooks, retention



Growth Tracking

 - Own social growth tracking for our top 50 creators

 - Surface the biggest opportunities and the biggest gaps each week


WHO YOU ARE

 - You have a genuine obsession with social media — you track algo changes like a hawk and know what's working before it goes mainstream

 - You've developed content strategy for creators, brands, or talent at scale

 - You can distill complex strategy into simple, actionable templates that a creator can execute without a second question

 - You understand the organic-to-paid funnel and can think across both

 - Bonus: you're AI-savvy and excited about building tools that scale this work

 - Comfortable working across fitness, wellness, and lifestyle verticals




HOW THIS ROLE WORKS

Initially, this person will be building the playbooks and feeding strategy directly to creator managers, who will hold creators accountable for execution. Long-term, the vision is to build AI-powered tools that automate the delivery of social guidance to creators at scale. This is a role with a real path to building something big.




TEAM

1 key hire to start, with support to be determined. We're looking for someone who is ideally AI-savvy and excited about building infrastructure, not just executing it.

source_jobs.title: Senior iOS Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

We are Playbook, a leading creator platform for fitness, health, and wellness. Our mission is to help fitness creators build sustainable businesses, while enabling hundreds of thousands of users to live healthier lives.

We are a fast-growing company in the fitness tech space, operating as a remote-first, product-driven team that values ownership, direct communication, and a strong growth mindset. We believe in “drivers, not passengers” — everyone is encouraged to take responsibility, think proactively, and act like an owner.




ROLE OVERVIEW

We’re looking for a Senior iOS Engineer to join our remote engineering team. You’ll work on meaningful, user-facing product features in our iOS app — building polished, performant, and reliable experiences that our users and creators rely on every day.

You’ll collaborate closely with Product and Design to deliver solutions aligned with real customer needs. This role is best suited for a senior individual contributor who enjoys hands-on development, product problem-solving, and working in a fast-moving startup environment.




RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Design and implement new iOS features with a strong focus on usability, clarity, and delivering value to real users.

 - Build and maintain robust, scalable mobile architecture (including networking, data persistence, and state management) that supports fast iteration and long-term maintainability.

 - Work closely with Product Managers and Designers to translate requirements into practical, well-scoped technical solutions. Provide input during planning to ensure features are feasible, maintainable, and aligned with user and business goals.

 - Ensure high-quality releases through clean, readable, and well-tested code. Participate in code reviews and contribute to shared standards around quality, testing, and maintainability.

 - Take ownership of the features you build. Identify issues or gaps, propose improvements, and iterate based on feedback. You’re comfortable working with ambiguity and adapting as requirements evolve.

 - Improve app performance and reliability by diagnosing bottlenecks, addressing crashes, and strengthening overall stability and user experience.




REQUIREMENTS

 - 5+ years of professional software development experience, with a strong focus on iOS development. Proven experience shipping production iOS applications end-to-end.

 - Strong proficiency in Swift and modern iOS development practices. Ability to build responsive, user-friendly interfaces with attention to detail and performance.

 - Experience with modern iOS UI patterns, including handling complex navigation, animations, and edge cases in real-world production apps.

 - Active daily use of AI coding assistants (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, or similar) for development, debugging, and problem-solving. We expect engineers to leverage these tools to ship faster and work through complex problems.

 - Strong understanding of networking on iOS (REST/GraphQL), including authentication flows, caching strategies, error handling, and offline/unstable network scenarios.

 - Experience designing maintainable architectures (e.g. MVVM, Redux-style state management, Clean Architecture, or similar) and improving existing codebases over time.

 - Solid understanding of iOS performance and debugging tools (e.g. Instruments, crash reporting, profiling) and the ability to diagnose issues effectively.

 - Strong communication skills in English. Comfortable working in a remote, cross-timezone team and collaborating asynchronously.




NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience with other frontend or mobile technologies, such as React Native or React.js, and an interest in cross-platform product development.

 - Experience with SwiftUI in production and building scalable design systems.

 - Experience integrating and maintaining third-party SDKs (analytics, payments, video, attribution).

 - Experience implementing and maintaining subscription flows on iOS

 - Familiarity with CI/CD

notes: Fitness tech platform with a strong product focus, remote-first team, and a growth mindset.
